2.description: (Color online) Coupon Assignment with Continuous Covariates Notes . These figures plot the probability of being assigned a coupon conditional on reporting X i under different scenarios. The reported X i for each individual, colored by their ITE, is plotted using a jitter underneath the allocation rules. (a) Cutoff rule without strategic behavior. (b) Cutoff rule with strategic behavior. (c) Optimal Stackelberg Rule.
